body:
# Description

Create checkpoint writer for lifecycle.

# [PKT-FND-008](task-0029): Checkpoint Writer

## Purpose

Create the checkpoint writer for lifecycle.

## Scope

- Checkpoint format
- Write logic
- Recovery support

## Implementation

1. Define checkpoint format
2. Implement writer
3. Add recovery support

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Checkpoints written correctly
2. Format is deterministic
3. Recovery works
